methodology: Articles sourced from Virginia-specific RSS feeds and Google News RSS, filtered for AI/technology/workforce relevance, then assessed by Claude against the scenario framework. Each article is tagged with the region it most affects and the scenario it signals toward.

signals.title: New partnership between VCU and AI Ready RVA aims to boost AI education, innovation and community impact - VCU News
signals.signal_reading: VCU's partnership with AI Ready RVA signals intentional knowledge distribution through community-focused education, potentially building peer networks that spread AI fluency beyond the university itself into Richmond's broader workforce.

signals.title: Maritime leaders on automation, tariffs and the industry’s future
signals.signal_reading: Maritime industry's $689M automation investment concentrates deep AI capability in Hampton Roads' defense-industrial complex, but workforce development focus suggests potential for distributed upskilling if training extends beyond elite engineering roles.

signals.title: Data center developers seek on-site energy in Wise
signals.signal_reading: A $1B data center in Wise County represents infrastructure concentration without capability distribution—tax revenue flows but deep AI skills remain elsewhere, exemplifying the hollow promise of data center economic development for Appalachian transition economies.

signals.title: RC-RV partners with ed2go to launch innovative, on-demand workforce training programs - Roanoke College
signals.signal_reading: RC-RV's partnership with ed2go for on-demand workforce training signals platform-mediated shallow adoption—accessible but not building deep local AI capability, potentially enabling broad participation without creating homegrown expertise.

signals.title: AI pressure grows on Richmond's young workforce - Axios
signals.signal_reading: AI pressure on Richmond's young workforce reveals metro areas experiencing rapid skill obsolescence and adaptation demands, widening the capability gap with regions lacking similar density of knowledge work and reskilling infrastructure.
